task_completion.description: Agent sets the location in Stellarium to the specified coordinates or NYC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Location window in Stellarium is visible, showing latitude around 40.77° N and longitude around 73.97° W, or the location is set to New York.

task_completion.description: Agent sets the date and time in Stellarium to the specified event time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Date and Time window in Stellarium is visible, showing 2023-02-28 20:00:00 (local time) or 2023-03-01 01:00:00 (UTC).

task_completion.description: Agent views Venus and Jupiter in the western sky in Stellarium.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Stellarium view shows Venus and Jupiter close together, with the compass indicating West (W).

task_completion.description: Agent captures the required screenshots to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager open to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/ showing at least 3 image files, or Stellarium notifications/dialogs indicating screenshots were saved to this path.

task_completion.description: Agent writes the forensic analysis report with the required details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing the file /home/ga/Desktop/forensic_sky_report.txt. The text includes the case number '2023-ASTRO-0441', the objects 'Venus' and 'Jupiter', and a conclusion stating the witness's description is consistent with the data.

integrity.description: Agent actually used the Stellarium GUI to verify the astronomical data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent interacting with the Stellarium application, not just writing the report based on external knowledge.

integrity.description: Screenshots saved appear to be genuine captures from Stellarium.
integrity.visual_evidence: The image files in the screenshots directory should have thumbnails or be opened in an image viewer showing actual Stellarium sky views, not blank files or downloaded images.

integrity.description: The report is written in a natural format, not just a copy-paste of the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in the report should be formatted as a forensic analysis or a coherent conclusion, rather than a direct copy of the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target location is Bethesda Fountain, NYC (40.7736 N, 73.9712 W). The target time is Feb 28, 2023 at 8:00 PM EST (March 1, 2023 at 01:00 UTC).
